item.title: Gretsch G6119 Tennessee Rose Lefty electric guitar Japan with case - $1,999 (Quincy)
item.description: Left handed Gretsch Tennesee Rose with bigsby. This guitar has been thoroughly gigged for over fifteen years. Had a professional fret level and dress, along with a pinned bridge (no longer free floating). Pickups upgraded to TV Jones Classic filtertrons. Original hardshell case included. No trades.

item.title: Eastman E20DL acoustic guitar dreadnought rosewood spruce lefty w/case - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: left-handed eastman acoustic, with hardshell case. no trades.

item.title: Eastman T386 electric guitar semi-hollow lefty with hard case - $1,000 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed 335-type semi-hollow guitar from eastman. hard case included. no pickguard. sounds great, no trades, thank you.

item.title: G&L Legacy LEFTY USA electric guitar strat style with case - $1,200 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed G&L strat, in outstanding condition. pots modified to function in right handed direction (clockwise-increase, i believe). includes hard case. includes tremolo arm. no trades, thank you.

item.title: Gibson SG Standard Lefty electric guitar with case USA - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: left-handed solid-body usa-made gibson, with original case. no trades.

item.title: Yamaha lefty acoustic guitar (FG720SL) - $275 (West Hempstead)
item.description: If you are a lefty guitarist (or aspiring guitarist) looking for a great value on a quality instrument this might be what you are after.

item.title: MARTIN Backpacker Guitar, Lefty LEFT HANDED - $175 (Holbrook)
item.description: MARTIN Backpacker Guitar, Lefty LEFT HANDED. Comes with gig bag (even has a pocket) and strap.

item.title: Lefty guitar & bass..$50/ea - $50 (Goffstown)
item.description: Good working condition...Good for beginners.

item.title: Eastman T59/TV-RD left handed semi-hollow electric guitar - $1,600 (Quincy)
item.description: this is the higher end lefty Eastman 335-style offering, comes relic'd from the factory. includes original case. no trades.

item.title: Agile AL-3100MCC Black P90 lefty wolfetone pickup upgrade with case - $500 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed single cutaway agile guitar with upgraded Wolfetone Meaner P90 pickup. includes hard case. no trades.

item.title: Fender CD-100LF NAT Left Handed Acoustic Guitar + Padded Case - $200 (Brooklyn)
item.description: BRAND NEW SOFT CASE included with backpack straps, back hook, briefcase handle & front zip pouch. Only string that is missing is the high E string (costs $6-10). Any further questions, don't hesitate to reach out. Kept in BEAUTIFUL condition. My first and only guitar. Have a lot more photos. Just ask!

item.title: Lefty no name strat - $125 (Hampton)
item.description: Lefty strat type guitar. Sounds great. $ 125. Like new

item.title: 1980 Lefty Guild D40C with K&K Pickup - $1,100 (Murray Hill)
item.description: 1980 Guild D40C (Left-Handed), rare cutaway model, solid condition with play wear consistent with a player guitar of this vintage, string action is excellent (3/64" to 4/64" high E to Low E at the 12th fret - saddle height is 1/8"), equipped with a K&K Pure Mini bridge plate transducer pickup, sturdy hardshell case with locking keys, $1,100.

item.title: Eastman SB59 left handed electric guitar with case - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: lefty eastman les paul in great shape. includes case. no trades.

item.title: 1980s Made in Japan Fender Squier Left handed Stratocaster - $950 (Scarsdale)
item.description: 1980s Fender Squier made in Japan

item.title: Fender Squire Sa-150 Guitar _ Left Handed - $80 (Lakewood Nj)
item.description: Lefty Guitar In Excellent Condition

item.title: Warrior Custom Built Lefty 4 String Bass - $3,375 (Stratford)
item.description: Price Reduction!!!

item.title: Fender standard Stratocaster Lefty strung righty MIM 2004 - $450 (Bradford)
item.description: 2004 MIM Fender Standard Stratocaster. Black with maple neck. Left handed guitar with a nut swap and is strung for right handed play. Classic strat sound and neck plays great. Two chips in paint see pics. Very nice guitar that just doesn't get played.

item.title: Lefty Left Handed Lyx Pro 'Jerry Garcia Alligator' Guitar & Amp 125/BO - $125 (Asbury Park)
item.description: Cheapo Left Handed Lyx Pro with sticker set made to look like Jerry Garcia's 'Alligator' guitar (1971-73) of which the custom repro in the Fender Custom shop costs 20 grand look it up. It's actually a pretty decent guitar and amp considering the economy quality of it I was surprised. Comes with gig bag and practice amp as pictured. Asking $125 or BEST OFFER*! . Perfect for a beginner or a Deadhead who'd dig a knock around knock off. New condition hardly used selling to get another new guitar. mV¸

item.title: Lefty Fender Kurt Cobain Jaguar - $700 (Salem)
item.description: Left Handed Cobain model Jaguar. Used well, but well cared for besides collecting some dust in recent days.

item.title: Martin backpacker lefty - $175 (Brooklyn)
item.description: Travel guitar

item.title: washburn D10 SCE lefty acoustic electric - $300 (Brooklyn)
item.description: Lefty left handed .

item.title: PA SYSTEM - SUNN - W/ COVERS - WORKS GREAT - $150 (Norton, MA,)
item.description: Selling my p.a. sound system - Sunn cabs in nice shape, upgraded with new 100 watt, 8ohm speakers, new mini horns in each cab, and they have their own factory covers. Powered mixer amplifier is a Sunn, put out by Fender, 150 watts rms, 18" wide, 10" tall - works great, has had all new EQ slider pots installed, 4 channel, XLR and 1/4" inputs, it is mono, but has inputs for stereo turntables, cds, etc. Sing through it, play guitar or other instruments through it. Plenty loud, and sounds nice. Would be good for playing clubs, garage band, or just enjoying your recorded music at home, man cave, or she shed, etc., etc. Speaker cabs are not too heavy or bulky, 29" tall, 17" wide. Whole system is very portable, and should fit o.k. in most cars. Comes with cables for speakers. Only reason for selling, is that I have a small place, and I need room for other things, hence the very reasonable price of $150. cash. Possible trade for certain pedalboards, and maybe lefty electric guitar. Delivery may be

item.title: PA SYSTEM - SUNN - W/COVERS - WORKS GREAT - $150 (Boston)
item.description: Selling my p.a. sound system - Sunn cabs in nice shape, upgraded with new 100 watt, 8ohm speakers, new mini horns in each cab, and they have their own factory covers. Powered mixer amplifier is a Sunn, put out by Fender, 150 watts rms, 18" wide, 10" tall - works great, has had all new EQ slider pots installed, 4 channel, XLR and 1/4" inputs, it is mono, but has inputs for stereo turntables, cds, etc. Sing through it, play guitar or other instruments through it. Plenty loud, and sounds nice. Would be good for playing clubs, garage band, or just enjoying your recorded music at home, man cave, or she shed, etc., etc. Speaker cabs are not too heavy or bulky, 29" tall, 17" wide. Whole system is very portable, and should fit o.k. in most cars. Comes with cables for speakers. Only reason for selling, is that I have a small place, and I need room for other things, hence the very reasonable price of $150. cash, or possible trade for certain pedalboard, or maybe lefty electric guitar. Delivery may be

item.title: Deering 5-string Boston Banjo - Left Handed - $800 (Wakefield)
item.description: This is a professional-grade, Deering 5-string Boston banjo in excellent condition, except for some lacquer issues on the back (see pics).

item.title: Ibanez Artwood Series AW54 Left Handed Acoustic - $225 (Williamstown)
item.description: Ibanez Art Wood series left handed acoustic guitar. Mahogany back and sides, rosewood fretboard. Less than 4 hours of playtime total. All joints (neck, bridge) are tight, minor nicks on neck and a few on the back as seen in the photos but otherwise looks and plays as new.

item.title: Ibanez Artwood Series AW54 LEFT HANDED Acoustic - $225 (Hoosick Falls)
item.description: Ibanez Art Wood series left handed acoustic guitar. Mahogany back and sides, rosewood fretboard. Less than 4 hours of playtime total. All joints (neck, bridge) are tight, minor nicks on neck and a few on the back as seen in the photos but otherwise looks and plays as new.

item.title: Kramer - $350 (Fishkill)
item.description: Fast shred hotrod looking for your perfect configuration.$400 or best offer.

item.title: Ibanez Artwood Series AW54 LEFT HANDED Acoustic - $225 (Bennington)
item.description: Ibanez Art Wood series left handed acoustic guitar. Mahogany back and sides, rosewood fretboard. Less than 4 hours of playtime total. All joints (neck, bridge) are tight, minor nicks on neck and a few on the back as seen in the photos but otherwise looks and plays as new.

item.title: LEFTY Epiphone SG Standard with hardshell case - $415 (Montpelier)
item.description: It's less than two years old; my son got a new guitar. Clean, plays well. Comes with an Epiphone hardshell case.

item.title: Left Handed BC Rich 'Masterpiece' Bich All-black-hardware - $750 (Bushwick)
item.description: Left Handed BC Rich 'Masterpiece' Bich

item.title: Ibanez AEG70 Left Handed Acoustic Electric Guitar - $270 (Brooklyn)
item.description: The AEG70L is a left-handed AEG series acoustic/electric guitar model introduced by Ibanez for 2020. This lefty model features a Tiger Burst finish.

item.title: Left Handed Left Squier Classic Vibe 50s Tele - $250 (Eatontown)
